feed.title: BCD-watch: Changes Report (weekly)
feed.subtitle: A feed that summarizes changes to BCD weekly

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon May 25 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 18 May 2026 through Monday, 25 May 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +17, -0

Support increases (17)

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ requestPointerLock ➞ options_unadjustedMovement_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ MathMLElement ➞ nonce
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ PerformanceResourceTiming ➞ finalResponseHeadersStart
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ PerformanceResourceTiming ➞ firstInterimResponseStart
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ RTCEncodedAudioFrame ➞ RTCEncodedAudioFrame ➞ options_metadata_receiveTime_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ RTCEncodedAudioFrame ➞ getMetadata ➞ return_object_property_receiveTime
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ RTCEncodedVideoFrame ➞ RTCEncodedVideoFrame ➞ options_metadata_receiveTime_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ RTCEncodedVideoFrame ➞ getMetadata ➞ return_object_property_receiveTime
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ RTCPeerConnection ➞ RTCPeerConnection ➞ configuration_rtcpMuxPolicy_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ AnimationEvent ➞ animation
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ Element ➞ getAnimations ➞ options_parameter ➞ pseudoElement_option
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ TransitionEvent ➞ animation
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ field-sizing
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ field-sizing ➞ content
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ field-sizing ➞ fixed
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

MATHML

  1. mathml ➞ elements ➞ a
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. mathml ➞ elements ➞ a ➞ href
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 12

Show all 12 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (4)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 15 May 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ anchor-name ➞ position_after_layout
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ types ➞ timeline-range-name
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ types ➞ timeline-range-name ➞ scroll
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ getAnimations ➞ options_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

New entries (8)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 15 May 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ AnimationEvent ➞ animation
  2. api ➞ Element ➞ getAnimations ➞ options_parameter
  3. api ➞ Element ➞ getAnimations ➞ options_parameter ➞ pseudoElement_option
  4. api ➞ TransitionEvent ➞ animation

CSS

  1. css ➞ types ➞ timeline-range-name
  2. css ➞ types ➞ timeline-range-name ➞ scroll

MATHML

  1. mathml ➞ elements ➞ a
  2. mathml ➞ elements ➞ a ➞ href

Removed entries (0)

No features were removed from bcd in this time period
  • Previous report: Monday, 18 May 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.16 (Friday, 15 May 2026) and v8.0.0 (Friday, 22 May 2026)

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon May 18 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 11 May 2026 through Monday, 18 May 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +1, -0

Support increases (1)

API

  1. api ➞ PerformanceResourceTiming ➞ deliveryType ➞ navigational-prefetch
    Added to Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 30

Show all 30 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (16)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 8 May 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

CSS

  1. css ➞ selectors ➞ -webkit-scrollbar
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ types ➞ url ➞ cross-origin
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ types ➞ url ➞ referrer-policy
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ types ➞ url ➞ integrity
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

API

  1. api ➞ AuthenticatorAttestationResponse ➞ getPublicKey ➞ algorithm_eddsa
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ AuthenticatorAttestationResponse ➞ getPublicKey ➞ algorithm_es256
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ AuthenticatorAttestationResponse ➞ getPublicKey ➞ algorithm_rs256
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ Element ➞ attachShadow ➞ options_slotAssignment_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Reporting-Endpoints ➞ default
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. http ➞ headers ➞ Reporting-Endpoints ➞ default ➞ receives_crash_type
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. http ➞ headers ➞ Reporting-Endpoints ➞ default ➞ receives_deprecation_type
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

WEBASSEMBLY

  1. webassembly ➞ api ➞ Global ➞ Global ➞ mutable
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. webassembly ➞ definitions ➞ global
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. webassembly ➞ definitions ➞ global ➞ mut
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ global_get
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ global_set
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

New entries (13)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 8 May 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ AuthenticatorAttestationResponse ➞ getPublicKey ➞ algorithm_eddsa
  2. api ➞ AuthenticatorAttestationResponse ➞ getPublicKey ➞ algorithm_es256
  3. api ➞ AuthenticatorAttestationResponse ➞ getPublicKey ➞ algorithm_rs256
  4. api ➞ Element ➞ attachShadow ➞ options_slotAssignment_parameter

CSS

  1. css ➞ types ➞ url ➞ integrity

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Reporting-Endpoints ➞ default
  2. http ➞ headers ➞ Reporting-Endpoints ➞ default ➞ receives_crash_type
  3. http ➞ headers ➞ Reporting-Endpoints ➞ default ➞ receives_deprecation_type

WEBASSEMBLY

  1. webassembly ➞ api ➞ Global ➞ Global ➞ mutable
  2. webassembly ➞ definitions ➞ global
  3. webassembly ➞ definitions ➞ global ➞ mut
  4. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ global_get
  5. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ global_set

Removed entries (1)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Friday, 8 May 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.

WEBASSEMBLY

  1. webassembly ➞ mutable-globals
  • Previous report: Monday, 11 May 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.15 (Friday, 8 May 2026) and v7.3.16 (Friday, 15 May 2026)

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon May 11 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 4 May 2026 through Monday, 11 May 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +127, -0

Support increases (127)

API

  1. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ allowProcessingInstruction
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ removeProcessingInstruction
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ shape-outside ➞ path
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ shape-outside ➞ rect
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ shape-outside ➞ xywh
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-break
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-break ➞ intersection
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-break ➞ none
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-break ➞ normal
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  9. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-inset-cap
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  24. css ➞ properties ➞ row-rule ➞ dashed
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  25. css ➞ properties ➞ row-rule ➞ dotted

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  113. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-style ➞ outset
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  114. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-style ➞ ridge
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  115. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-style ➞ solid
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  116. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-visibility-items
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  117. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-visibility-items ➞ all
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  118. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-visibility-items ➞ around
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  119. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-visibility-items ➞ between
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  120. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-visibility-items ➞ normal
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  121. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-width
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  122. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-width ➞ medium
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  123. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-width ➞ thick
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  124. css ➞ properties ➞ rule-width ➞ thin
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Intl ➞ Locale ➞ variants
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 138

Show all 138 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (8)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Thursday, 30 April 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ container ➞ style_queries_for_custom_properties ➞ range_syntax
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

API

  1. api ➞ GPUDevice ➞ createTexture ➞ descriptor_usage_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ GPUDevice ➞ createTexture ➞ descriptor_usage_parameter ➞ accept_transient_attachment
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ GPUTexture ➞ createView ➞ descriptor_usage_parameter ➞ transient_attachment
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ GPUTexture ➞ usage ➞ transient_attachment
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ destroy
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ X-Frame-Options ➞ DENY
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Intl ➞ DateTimeFormat ➞ DateTimeFormat ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_timeZone_parameter ➞ utc_offset
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

New entries (130)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Thursday, 30 April 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ GPUDevice ➞ createTexture ➞ descriptor_usage_parameter
  2. api ➞ GPUDevice ➞ createTexture ➞ descriptor_usage_parameter ➞ accept_transient_attachment
  3. api ➞ GPUTexture ➞ createView ➞ descriptor_usage_parameter ➞ transient_attachment
  4. api ➞ GPUTexture ➞ usage ➞ transient_attachment
  5. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ destroy
  6. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ allowProcessingInstruction
  7. api ➞ Sanitizer ➞ removeProcessingInstruction

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-break
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-break ➞ intersection

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon May 04 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 27 April 2026 through Monday, 4 May 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +3, -0

Support increases (3)

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ requestFullscreen ➞ options_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ Element ➞ requestFullscreen ➞ options_parameter ➞ keyboardLock_option
    Added to Firefox,Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ SharedWorker ➞ SharedWorker ➞ options_extendedLifetime_parameter
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 89

Show all 89 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (33)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 24 April 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

CSS

  1. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ contrast-color
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ accent-color ➞ transparent
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ shape-outside ➞ rect
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ stop-color ➞ transparent
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ types ➞ attr ➞ fallback
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ requestFullscreen ➞ options_parameter ➞ navigationUI_option
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ Element ➞ requestFullscreen ➞ options_parameter ➞ screen_option
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ GPU ➞ requestAdapter ➞ options_featureLevel
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ attributionReporting
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ body
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ body ➞ accepts_readablestream
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ browsingTopics
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ duplex
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ keepalive
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ priority
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ privateToken
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ referrer
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ targetAddressSpace
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ XRSession ➞ visibilitymaskchange_event
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  16. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  17. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ attributionReporting
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  18. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ body
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  19. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ body ➞ accepts_readablestream
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  20. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ browsingTopics
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  21. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ duplex
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  22. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ keepalive
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  23. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ priority
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  24. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ privateToken
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  27. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ targetAddressSpace
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ audio ➞ autoplay
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

New entries (35)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 24 April 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ requestFullscreen ➞ options_parameter
  2. api ➞ Element ➞ requestFullscreen ➞ options_parameter ➞ keyboardLock_option
  3. api ➞ Element ➞ requestFullscreen ➞ options_parameter ➞ navigationUI_option
  4. api ➞ Element ➞ requestFullscreen ➞ options_parameter ➞ screen_option

  7. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ attributionReporting
  8. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ body
  9. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ body ➞ accepts_readablestream
  10. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ browsingTopics
  11. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ duplex
  12. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ keepalive
  13. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ priority
  14. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ privateToken
  15. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ referrer
  16. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ options_parameter ➞ targetAddressSpace
  17. api ➞ SharedWorker ➞ SharedWorker ➞ options_extendedLifetime_parameter
  18. api ➞ XRSession ➞ visibilitymaskchange_event
  19. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter
  20. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ attributionReporting
  21. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ body
  22. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ body ➞ accepts_readablestream
  23. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ browsingTopics
  24. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ duplex
  25. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ keepalive
  26. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ priority
  27. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ privateToken
  28. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ referrerPolicy
  29. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ signal
  30. api ➞ fetch ➞ options_parameter ➞ targetAddressSpace

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ accent-color ➞ transparent
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ shape-outside ➞ rect
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ stop-color ➞ transparent
  4. css ➞ types ➞ attr ➞ fallback

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ audio ➞ autoplay

Removed entries (21)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Friday, 24 April 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ requestFullscreen ➞ options_navigationUI_parameter
  2. api ➞ Element ➞ requestFullscreen ➞ options_screen_parameter
  3. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ init_attributionReporting_parameter
  4. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ init_browsingTopics_parameter
  5. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ init_duplex_parameter
  6. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ init_keepalive_parameter
  7. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ init_priority_parameter

  9. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ init_referrer_parameter

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Apr 27 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 20 April 2026 through Monday, 27 April 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +40, -0

Support increases (40)

API

  1. api ➞ CanvasRenderingContext2D ➞ lang
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ DocumentPictureInPicture ➞ requestWindow ➞ option_disallowReturnToOpener
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ GPURenderBundleEncoder ➞ setVertexBuffer ➞ unset_vertex_buffer
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ GPURenderPassEncoder ➞ setVertexBuffer ➞ unset_vertex_buffer
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageBuffersInFragmentStage
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageBuffersInVertexStage
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageTexturesInFragmentStage
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageTexturesInVertexStage
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ Navigator ➞ serial
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ OffscreenCanvasRenderingContext2D ➞ lang
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ Serial
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ Serial ➞ getPorts
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ Serial ➞ requestPort
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ SerialPort
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ close
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  16. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ connect_event
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  17. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ connected
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  18. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ disconnect_event
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  19. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ forget
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  20. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ getInfo
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  21. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ getSignals
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  22. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ open
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  23. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ readable
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  24. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ setSignals
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  25. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ writable
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  26. api ➞ WorkerNavigator ➞ serial
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  27. api ➞ CSSContainerRule ➞ conditions
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  28. api ➞ LanguageModel
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  29. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ append
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  30. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ availability_static
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  31. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ clone
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  32. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ contextUsage
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  33. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ contextWindow
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  34. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ contextoverflow_event
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  35. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ create_static
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  36. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ measureContextUsage
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  37. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ prompt
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  38. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ promptStreaming
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ position-anchor ➞ normal
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ iframe ➞ allow ➞ serial
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 44

Show all 44 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (16)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 17 April 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ FileSystemHandle ➞ move
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_color ➞ list
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Integrity-Policy
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. http ➞ headers ➞ Integrity-Policy ➞ blocked-destinations_script
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. http ➞ headers ➞ Integrity-Policy-Report-Only
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. http ➞ headers ➞ Integrity-Policy-Report-Only ➞ blocked-destinations_script
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy-Report-Only
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

New entries (23)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 17 April 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

Removed entries (5)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Friday, 17 April 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.
